title: Junayd of Baghdad: Sobriety After Intoxication
description: Junayd, the 'master of the masters,' who taught that the true mystic returns to sobriety after ecstatic union — acting normally while internally transformed.
introduction: Junayd, the 'master of the masters,' who taught that the true mystic returns to sobriety after ecstatic union — acting normally while internally transformed.

translation.text: The end is a return to the beginning. You are as you were before you were. Sufism is that God makes you die to yourself and makes you alive in Him.
